title: Question about watching Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Question about watching Evangelion             Quote Post by Houss » Thu Sep 01, 2022 11:08 pm Is it fair to say that you need to watch more than one time Evangelion to fully grasp 100% of the plot ? I'm rewatching now, and I'm picking up and understanding a lot more plot points than my first time watching, anyone else experienced the same thing ?

[]: Re: Question about watching Evangelion             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 02, 2022 1:48 am While the broad brush outline is there for the "just watch it when it was broadcast" audience, there are indeed plenty of places where chance remarks or asides turn out to be more significant in saying what is actually going on than they first appear.

[]: Re: Question about watching Evangelion             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Sep 02, 2022 9:31 am Yeah. Eva is easy enough to understand the broad strokes on a first watch if you're paying proper attention, but like anything else, you will pick up on new things on rewatches that you didn't notice before or - in the case of a first rewatch especially - pieces of foreshadowing that were hidden in plain sight

[]: Re: Question about watching Evangelion             Quote Post by Houss » Fri Sep 02, 2022 10:19 am Blockio wrote: Yeah. Eva is easy enough to understand the broad strokes on a first watch if you're paying proper attention, but like anything else, you will pick up on new things on rewatches that you didn't notice before or - in the case of a first rewatch especially - pieces of foreshadowing that were hidden in plain sight

[]: Re: Question about watching Evangelion             Quote Post by sithsauron » Fri Sep 02, 2022 10:52 pm I don't think anyone can fully grasp 100% of the plot no matter how many times they watch it. Even if being told things point blank by official material or being explained certain ideas generally accepted by core fans, there are just too many gaps and reaches to rid doubt about what really happened behind the scenes.

[]: Re: Question about watching Evangelion             Quote Post by WDS » Wed Sep 28, 2022 9:36 pm You can watch it a hundred times and spend 20 years arguing about it on the Internet and you still won't fully understand it.
